name: Acorn Squash Baked with Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out and discard the squash seeds and fibers.
2. Place the squash halves in a baking dish coated with margarine.
3. Add 1 teaspoon brown sugar and 1 teaspoon margarine to each half.
4. Cover and bake in a hot oven (400 degrees) for 30 minutes.
5. Scoop the cooked squash out of the shells, leaving a wall about 1/4-inch thick.
6. Mash the squash and combine with 1 tablespoon margarine, crushed pineapple, ground nutmeg, and salt if desired. Beat until well blended.
